calendar.matters:
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Aug-04-2011 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-31-2011 Off Calendar

Default Prove Hearing
Off Calendar May-03-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: J. Willis-McGhee,
CSR: B. Fields, CSR #7235

DREW CALLAHAN, Esq. appeared for plaintiff(s) BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.,

Default has been entered against the Defendant(s).

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff(s), and against the Defaulted Defendant(s) HECTOR W. ESCOBER for Judgment as follows:

Damages/Principal - $250,000.00
Prejudgment Interest - $18,143.00
Attorney's Fees - $1500.00
Costs - $454.510
LATE FEES - $133.22
Total judgment in the amount of $270,230.72

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-18-2011 Continued To Jun-10-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 610

Default Prove Hearing
Off Calendar Mar-28-2011 Continued To May-03-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-07-2011 Continued To Apr-29-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 610
